scripts.setup: bun run install:frontends && bun run restore:backend
scripts.install:frontends: cd frontend/frontend-Candidato && npm install --no-package-lock && cd ../frontend-Empleador && npm install --no-package-lock && cd ../frontend-Admin && npm install --no-package-lock
scripts.dev:frontends: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n candidato,empleador,admin -c green,cyan,magenta "bun run dev:candidato" "bun run dev:empleador" "bun run dev:admin"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n backend,candidato,empleador,admin -c yellow,green,cyan,magenta "bun run dev:backend" "bun run dev:candidato" "bun run dev:empleador" "bun run dev:admin"
scripts.build:frontends: cd frontend/frontend-Candidato && bun run build && cd ../frontend-Empleador && bun run build && cd ../frontend-Admin && bun run build
